title: NOT A GLOBAL WATCH AS STATED
text: even though it says Global..it will not pair if you are in the united states..as the other reviewer stated ..I had to use Portugal...which is not acceptable.The watch looks well built to me  but is useless at this point in time..Perhaps Xiaomi will correct the problem in the future

title: Money waste
text:
This is a very accurate and honest review I'm sharing just to share what happened with this watch.

Design ain't bad at all but after just one month it started to stuck while receiving phone calls, the vibration and notification sound will last for at least 5 minutes even after call finished. Doesn't seem to accurate measure steps and BPM.

After performing several resets by unpair the Bluetooth or factory reset it via settings or the app, the issue still happens.

I was excited as my husband shared good comments about Xiaomi devices and ended up with this disappointing experience.

It maybe bad luck but really doesn't worth to take a risk with this item.

title: Basic smart watch.  Skip this purchase
text: The face is far too small. Only works if set on Portugal. Looks pretty underwhelming. If I had time to I would return it

title: Great battery
text:
For me the battery last about 10 days.
when setting up I had to switch location to portugal to connect

title: Si y No
text: Pasos los cuenta súper bien, las calorías no, super mal en ese sentido.....todo lo demás funciona normal

title: Excelente producto
text: Producto increíble, funciona perfecto, justo lo que se requería

title: Ok for the price. but, not great
text:
Moved from Samsung Galaxy watch to MI.
Battery life remarkable. but accuracy is not good
